mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, contact_name, contact_phone, address, status, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM mdm_warehouse WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, tenant_id, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, contact_name, contact_phone, address, status, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM mdm_warehouse WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, contact_name, contact_phone, address, status, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM mdm_warehouse WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode} AND deleted = 0
